issues.description: Translation key 'history.empty' may contain invalid text for split operation. Using split('.')[0] on translation that doesn't contain period.
issues.issue: Translation value is 'Aucun don enregistré' (no period), split will fail or return unexpected result
issues.suggestion: Either: 1) Create separate key for just 'No donations' OR 2) Use string directly without split OR 3) Add condition check before split
issues.fix_approach: Create new key: 'home.donationsCount' with value 'Aucun don'

issues.description: Using split() on translation key 'helpAndAdvice.statDays' that contains 'jours entre\nchaque don' with newline, not period.
issues.issue: Translation contains \n not space, split(' ')[0] returns 'jours', not expected 'days' number
issues.suggestion: Extract numeric value properly or use dedicated translation key for just the number

issues.description: URL manipulation with hardcoded string replace operation without proper validation
issues.issue: If API URL changes pattern, this breaks. No fallback if replace doesn't find '/api'
issues.suggestion: Use environment variable for profile URL base directly

issues.description: Optional chaining may return undefined but used without null check in find callback
issues.issue: myResponse could be undefined (if no match found), then used in conditions without checking undefined
issues.suggestion: Add explicit undefined check before using myResponse
issues.fix_approach: Add null coalescing: const myResponse = data.details?.find((d: any) => d.isMe) ?? null;

issues.description: Props typed as 'any' for animated component without proper type definition
issues.issue: Function expects specific prop types but accepts any, breaking type safety
issues.suggestion: Define proper interface for component props
issues.fix_approach: interface PulseBadgeProps { label: string; color: string; }

issues.description: useEffect has 'posthog' as dependency but effect listens to events, may cause infinite loops
issues.issue: PostHog object might update frequently, causing effect to re-run unnecessarily
issues.suggestion: Remove posthog from dependencies or memoize it

issues.description: useEffect without proper dependency array could cause infinite loops
issues.issue: Only has empty deps, but calls function that may need dependencies
issues.suggestion: Add dependencies or verify function is stable
issues.fix_approach: Verify checkPermissionAndLoad is not redefined on each render

issues.description: Accessing deeply nested optional property without proper guard
issues.issue: If pop() returns undefined (empty array), variable becomes undefined but used later

issues.description: Debug console.log in production code - API request logging
issues.issue: Should only log in development (__DEV__)
issues.suggestion: Wrap in if (__DEV__) or use logger service

issues.description: Unguarded console.error in request interceptor
issues.issue: All errors logged to console, including user-caused ones
issues.suggestion: Use logger service with proper error handling

issues.description: API response logging visible in production
issues.issue: Log guards missing, should use __DEV__ check

issues.description: Unguarded error logging in response interceptor
issues.issue: All API errors logged with potentially sensitive data
issues.suggestion: Use error handling service with sanitization

issues.description: Permission denial not handled gracefully
issues.issue: Should use UI notification instead of console
issues.fix_approach: Use NotificationContext to show user message

issues.description: Project ID discovery logging with no guards
issues.issue: Should be wrapped in __DEV__

issues.description: Push token logging exposes sensitive data
issues.issue: Project ID is potentially sensitive, should not log

issues.description: Login error exposed in console
issues.code_snippet: console.error("Erreur lors de la connexion:", error);
issues.issue: Login errors may contain sensitive info

issues.description: Alert API error logging with full response
issues.code_snippet: console.error("Send Alert API Error:", error.response?.data || error.message);
issues.issue: Full API response may contain server internals
issues.fix_approach: Extract and log only message field

issues.description: Image cache directory path exposed in logs
issues.issue: File paths should not be logged in production

issues.description: Catch parameter typed as 'any'
issues.issue: Cannot guarantee error object properties
issues.suggestion: Use proper Error type or check properties

issues.description: Props typed as 'any' for alerts array
issues.issue: No type definition for alert objects
issues.suggestion: Define Alert interface and use it
issues.fix_approach: type AlertItem = { id: number; location: string; ... }

issues.description: Profile image prop typed as 'any'
issues.issue: No validation of image object structure
issues.suggestion: Use union type for null or image source

issues.description: User data prop typed as 'any'
issues.issue: No type safety for user properties

issues.description: Generic type parameters use 'any'
issues.code_snippet: export const useApiCall = <T extends (...args: any[]) => Promise<any>>
issues.issue: Defeats purpose of generics

issues.description: Double split operation without validation
issues.issue: If pop() returns undefined, second split fails
issues.fix_approach: const last = url.split('/').pop() || ''; return last.split('?')[0] || uuid();

issues.description: Location fetch with no timeout protection
issues.issue: No timeout configured, could hang indefinitely

issues.description: Notification listener setup without cleanup in some paths
issues.issue: Event listeners might accumulate on re-mounts

issues.description: useEffect without specified dependencies
issues.issue: Cannot determine if dependencies are correct
issues.suggestion: Check actual dependency array in code
issues.fix_approach: Add explicit dependencies or empty array if intentional

issues.description: useEffect handling location without error boundaries
issues.issue: If location service is unavailable, no fallback
issues.fix_approach: Wrap in try-catch with error useState

issues.description: Location permission denial logged
issues.code_snippet: console.log('Permission to access location was denied');
issues.issue: Should be handled via UI, not console

issues.description: Logger utility uses console directly without filtering
issues.issue: Data parameter could contain sensitive info

issues.description: Language setup error logging
issues.issue: Should fail gracefully without console output
issues.fix_approach: Initialize with default language without logging

issues.description: WhatsApp sharing error not handled
issues.issue: Uses native Alert instead of custom notification

issues.description: Alert item parameter typed as 'any'
issues.issue: No type guarantee for item properties

issues.description: Event parameter typed as 'any'
issues.issue: No type for event object

issues.description: User name with fallback but no type
issues.issue: Could return undefined without proper type

issues.description: Error thrown but message may be undefined
issues.code_snippet: throw new Error(apiMessage || "Erreur lors de l'envoi de l'alerte");
issues.issue: If all fallbacks are empty, throws empty Error
issues.fix_approach: throw new Error(apiMessage || error.message || 'Alert send failed')

issues.description: Pending alert check wrapped in console.warn but no error handling
issues.issue: Warning logged but execution continues

issues.description: Routing without guaranteed params
issues.issue: Redirects on invalid, but may have side effects
issues.fix_approach: Validate in parent component before navigation

issues.description: Inbox fetch error logged
issues.issue: Full error exposed
issues.fix_approach: Use proper error handler with sanitization

issues.description: Message fetch error with full error details
issues.issue: Stack traces may be exposed

issues.description: Toast service logs to console instead of using proper notification
issues.issue: Duplicate logging system
issues.suggestion: Remove console.log, rely on toast only

issues.description: Analytics events logged to console
issues.issue: Dev-only but left in code

issues.description: useEffect on animation without specified purpose
issues.issue: Animation might re-initialize
issues.fix_approach: Check if empty array is correct for animation

missing_translations.note: Has fallback text but should be in translation file

immediate_actions: 1. Fix CRITICAL_001 & CRITICAL_002: Refactor split operations on translations
2. Fix CRITICAL_003: Add proper env variable for profile URL
3. Fix CRITICAL_004 & CRITICAL_005: Add proper nullability checks
4. Fix CRITICAL_006 & CRITICAL_007: Review useEffect dependencies
within_sprint: Remove all 113 console statements (wrap in __DEV__ or use logger)
Replace 67 'any' types with proper TypeScript interfaces
Add missing translation keys to both fr and en files
Implement centralized error logging with sensitivity filtering
refactoring: Create AlertType interface to replace all 'any' for alerts
Create UserType interface for userData props
Extract URL manipulation to config service
Implement proper error boundary for async operations
Create logger service as single source for all logging
